mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_accessibility (content_id, parking, route, public_transport, ticket_office, promotion, wheelchair, exit_info, elevator, restroom, auditorium, room, handicap_etc, braile_block, help_dog, guide_human, audio_guide, big_print, braile_promotion, guide_system, blind_handicap_etc, sign_guide, video_guide, hearing_room, hearing_handicap_etc, stroller, lactation_room, baby_spare_chair, infants_family_etc) VALUES (#{contentId}, #{parking}, #{route}, #{publicTransport}, #{ticketOffice}, #{promotion}, #{wheelchair}, #{exit}, #{elevator}, #{restroom}, #{auditorium}, #{room}, #{handicapEtc}, #{braileBlock}, #{helpDog}, #{guideHuman}, #{audioGuide}, #{bigPrint}, #{brailePromotion}, #{guideSystem}, #{blindHandicapEtc}, #{signGuide}, #{videoGuide}, #{hearingRoom}, #{hearingHandicapEtc}, #{stroller}, #{lactationRoom}, #{babySpareChair}, #{infantsFamilyEtc});
